## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Tyson Mao (Tobiko) and Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) to discuss potential collaboration on growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tobiko: Series A startup (\~$450K revenue, 13 customers) seeking to improve top-of-funnel growth and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [GrowthX: AI-powered content engine for organic growth, 12-week accelerator program + ongoing support](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Timing mismatch: Tobiko likely too early-stage for GrowthX's current offerings and high demand](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

## Topics

### Tobiko's Current Status and Needs

  - [Series A startup (preemptive round)](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [13 customers, $450K revenue](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [2 AEs, sales motion needs refinement](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Strong open-source traction](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Seeking to:](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
    1.  Test messaging against market segments
    2.  Increase top-of-funnel growth
  - [Product-market fit: Useful product beating incumbents, but migration friction](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-powered content engine for organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [12-week accelerator program + ongoing support](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Team of experts (e.g., ex-TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [AI workflows adapted to each client](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Focus on long-term organic growth (12-month journey)](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Pricing and details available on website](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

### Market Fit Discussion

  - [GrowthX likely not ideal fit for Tobiko's current stage](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [High demand for GrowthX services (waitlist until late April)](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Tobiko needs more confidence in messaging and channels before revisiting](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyson to focus on refining Tobiko's messaging and identifying effective channels](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Potential to revisit GrowthX collaboration when Tobiko is more prepared for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [No immediate follow-up scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/Xe9QEyygmP8ujF2noxxBAHzx9sDHepvE?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
